114:   async createOrUpdateUserProfile(data: InsertUserProfile) {
115:     const existing = await db.select().from(userProfiles).where(eq(userProfiles.userId, data.userId));
116:     
117:     if (existing.length > 0) {
118:       const [updated] = await db.update(userProfiles)
119:         .set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
120:         .where(eq(userProfiles.userId, data.userId))
121:         .returning();
122:       return updated;
123:     } else {

135:   async generateDailyQRCode() {
136:     const today = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
137:     const qrCode = `ATT-${today}-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8).toUpperCase()}`;
138:     const existing = await db.select().from(dailyQRCodes).where(eq(dailyQRCodes.date, today));
139:     if (existing.length > 0) {
140:       return existing[0];
141:     }
142:     const [created] = await db.insert(dailyQRCodes).values({ date: today, qrCode }).returning();
143:     return created;
144:   }

149:     if (!code) {

158:     const existing = await db.select().from(dailyQRCodes).where(eq(dailyQRCodes.date, today));
159:     if (existing.length > 0) {

163:         .returning();

179:   async checkIn(userId: number, qrCode: string) {
180:     const today = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
181:     const existing = await db.select().from(attendanceRecords).where(
182:       and(eq(attendanceRecords.userId, userId), eq(attendanceRecords.date, today))
183:     );
184:     if (existing.length > 0) {
185:       return null;
186:     }
187:     const [created] = await db.insert(attendanceRecords).values({
188:       userId,
189:       date: today,
190:       qrCode,
191:       checkIn: new Date(),
192:       status: "checked_in",
193:     }).returning();
194:     return created;
195:   }
196: 
197:   async checkOut(userId: number, qrCode: string) {
198:     const today = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
199:     const [existing] = await db.select().from(attendanceRecords).where(
200:       and(eq(attendanceRecords.userId, userId), eq(attendanceRecords.date, today), eq(attendanceRecords.status, "checked_in"))
201:     );
202:     if (!existing) return null;
203:     
204:     const checkInTime = new Date(existing.checkIn!);
205:     const checkOutTime = new Date();
206:     const totalMs = checkOutTime.getTime() - checkInTime.getTime();
207:     const totalHours = Math.round(totalMs / (1000 * 60 * 60) * 100) / 100;
208:     
209:     const [updated] = await db.update(attendanceRecords)
210:       .set({ checkOut: checkOutTime, totalHours: Math.floor(totalHours * 100), status: "checked_out" })
211:       .where(eq(attendanceRecords.id, existing.id))
212:       .returning();
213:     return updated;
214:   }

420:   async createOrder(order: InsertOrder): Promise<Order | { merged: true; order: Order }> {
421:     const pendingOrder = await this.getPendingOrderByTable(order.tableNumber);
422:     
423:     if (pendingOrder) {
424:       const existingItems = pendingOrder.items as any[];
425:       const newItems = order.items as any[];
426:       
427:       const mergedItems = [...existingItems];
428:       
429:       for (const newItem of newItems) {
430:         const existingIndex = mergedItems.findIndex(
431:           i => i.menuItemId === newItem.menuItemId && i.notes === newItem.notes
432:         );
433:         if (existingIndex >= 0) {
434:           mergedItems[existingIndex] = {
435:             ...mergedItems[existingIndex],
436:             quantity: mergedItems[existingIndex].quantity + newItem.quantity
437:           };
438:         } else {
439:           mergedItems.push(newItem);
440:         }
441:       }
442:       
443:       const newTotal = mergedItems.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price * item.quantity, 0);
444:       
445:       const [updated] = await db.update(orders)
446:         .set({ 
447:           items: mergedItems,
448:           totalAmount: newTotal
449:         })
450:         .where(eq(orders.id, pendingOrder.id))
451:         .returning();
452:       
453:       return { merged: true, order: updated };
454:     }
455:     
456:     const [created] = await db.insert(orders).values(order).returning();
457:     return created;
458:   }
459:

465:       )

530:   async sendToKitchen(orderId: number) {
531:     const order = await this.getOrder(orderId);
532:     if (!order) throw new Error("Order not found");
533:     
534:     const kitchenItems = (order.items as any[]).map(item => ({
535:       name: item.name,
536:       quantity: item.quantity,
537:       notes: item.notes || null,
538:       cookingStatus: "cooking"
539:     }));
540: 
541:     const [existing] = await db.select().from(kitchenOrders)
542:       .where(eq(kitchenOrders.orderId, orderId))
543:       .limit(1);
544: 
545:     let result;
546:     if (existing) {
547:       const [updated] = await db.update(kitchenOrders)
548:         .set({ items: kitchenItems, status: "Cooking" })
549:         .where(eq(kitchenOrders.id, existing.id))
550:         .returning();
551:       result = updated;
552:     } else {
553:       const [created] = await db.insert(kitchenOrders).values({
554:         orderId: order.id,
555:         tableNumber: order.tableNumber,
556:         items: kitchenItems,
557:         status: "Cooking",
558:         priority: "normal"
559:       }).returning();
560:       result = created;
561:     }
562: 
563:     await db.update(orders)
564:       .set({ status: "InKitchen" })
565:       .where(eq(orders.id, orderId));
566: 
567:     return result;
568:   }

585:   async startKitchenItem(kitchenOrderId: number, itemName: string) {
586:     const [kitchenOrder] = await db.select().from(kitchenOrders).where(eq(kitchenOrders.id, kitchenOrderId));
587:     if (!kitchenOrder) return;
588: 
589:     const items = kitchenOrder.items as any[];
590:     const updatedItems = items.map(item => {
591:       if (item.name === itemName) {
592:         return { ...item, cookingStatus: "cooking" };
593:       }
594:       return item;
595:     });
596: 
597:     await db.update(kitchenOrders)
598:       .set({

602:       })
603:       .where(eq(kitchenOrders.id, kitchenOrderId));

608:     if (kitchenOrder[0]) {
609:       await db.update(kitchenOrders)
610:         .set({ status: "Done", completedAt: new Date() })
611:         .where(eq(kitchenOrders.id, id));
612: 
613:       const relatedOrder = await this.getOrder(kitchenOrder[0].orderId);
614:       if (relatedOrder) {
615:         await db.update(orders)
616:           .set({ status: "Ready" })
617:           .where(eq(orders.id, relatedOrder.id));

622:   async completeKitchenItem(kitchenOrderId: number, itemName: string) {
623:     const [kitchenOrder] = await db.select().from(kitchenOrders).where(eq(kitchenOrders.id, kitchenOrderId));
624:     if (!kitchenOrder) return;
625: 
626:     const items = kitchenOrder.items as any[];
627:     const updatedItems = items.map(item => {
628:       if (item.name === itemName) {
629:         return { ...item, cookingStatus: "done" };
630:       }
631:       return item;
632:     });
633: 
634:     await db.update(kitchenOrders)
635:       .set({ items: updatedItems })
636:       .where(eq(kitchenOrders.id, kitchenOrderId));
637: 
638:     const allDone = updatedItems.every(item => item.cookingStatus === "done");
639:     if (allDone) {
640:       await db.update(kitchenOrders)
641:         .set({ status: "Done", completedAt: new Date() })
642:         .where(eq(kitchenOrders.id, kitchenOrderId));
643: 
644:       const relatedOrder = await this.getOrder(kitchenOrder.orderId);
645:       if (relatedOrder) {
646:         await db.update(orders)
647:           .set({ status: "Ready" })
648:           .where(eq(orders.id, relatedOrder.id));
649:       }
650:     }
651:   }
652: 
653:   async getDailyReport() {
654:     const today = new Date();
655:     const start = startOfDay(today);
656:     const end = endOfDay(today);
657: 
658:     const todayOrders = await db.select().from(orders);
659:     
660:     const paidOrders = todayOrders.filter(o => 
661:       o.paymentStatus === "Paid" && o.paidAt && new Date(o.paidAt) >= start && new Date(o.paidAt) <= end
662:     );
663:     
664:     const todayRevenue = paidOrders.reduce((acc, o) => acc + o.totalAmount, 0);
665:     const completedOrders = paidOrders.length;
666:     const pendingOrders = todayOrders.filter(o => o.status === "Pending" || o.status === "InKitchen" || o.status === "Ready").length;
667:     const kitchenActive = (await this.getActiveKitchenOrders()).length;
668: 
669:     return {
670:       todayRevenue,
671:       completedOrders,
672:       pendingOrders,
673:       kitchenActive
674:     };
675:   }
676: 
677:   async getBestSellers() {
678:     const allOrders = await db.select().from(orders);
679:     
680:     const itemCounts: Record<string, number> = {};
681:     
682:     allOrders.forEach(order => {
683:       const items = order.items as any[];
684:       items.forEach(item => {
685:         if (!itemCounts[item.name]) {
686:           itemCounts[item.name] = 0;
687:         }
688:         itemCounts[item.name] += item.quantity;
689:       });
690:     });
691: 
692:     return Object.entries(itemCounts)
693:       .map(([name, totalQuantity]) => ({ name, totalQuantity }))
694:       .sort((a, b) => b.totalQuantity - a.totalQuantity)
695:       .slice(0, 10);
696:   }
697: 
698:   async getPaymentSettings() {
699:     return await db.select().from(paymentSettings);
700:   }
701: 
702:   async clearOldCompletedKitchenOrders(): Promise<number> {
703:     const todayStart = startOfToday();
704:     
705:     const ordersToDelete = await db.select().from(kitchenOrders).where(
706:       and(
707:         eq(kitchenOrders.status, "Done"),
708:         lt(kitchenOrders.completedAt, todayStart)
709:       )
710:     );
711:     
712:     if (ordersToDelete.length === 0) return 0;
713:     
714:     const idsToDelete = ordersToDelete.map(o => o.id);
715:     await db.delete(kitchenOrders).where(inArray(kitchenOrders.id, idsToDelete));
716:     
717:     return ordersToDelete.length;
718:   }
719: 
720:   async updatePaymentSetting(method: string, data: Partial<InsertPaymentSetting>) {
721:     const [updated] = await db.update(paymentSettings)
722:       .set(data)
723:       .where(eq(paymentSettings.method, method))
724:       .returning();
725:     
726:     if (!updated) {
727:       const [created] = await db.insert(paymentSettings)
728:         .values({ method, ...data })
729:         .returning();
730:       return created;
731:     }
732:     return updated;
733:   }
734: }

736: export const storage = new DatabaseStorage();
